mapper.select: SELECT id, `order-id`, `dish-id`, `dish-name`, price, quantity, amount, `create-time` FROM t_order_detail
SELECT id, `order-id`, `dish-id`, `dish-name`, price, quantity, amount, `create-time` FROM t_order_detail WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, `order-id`, `dish-id`, `dish-name`, price, quantity, amount, `create-time` FROM t_order_detail WHERE `order-id` = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_detail (`order-id`, `dish-id`, `dish-name`, price, quantity, amount, `create-time`) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{dishName}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{amount}, #{createTime})
